name: Sant Sarwan Singh Gandharv (Dumeli)
body: Sant Sarwan Singh Ji was a multitalented Raagi who earned a double M.A. in music and he could play almost any instrument that he touched. He lost his eyesight at the age of 5 due to chickenpox and he was brought to Sant Dalip Singh Ji in Dumeli. Sant Ji saw a great future ahead of him and took him under his care. He learned the basics of Raags for about 2 and a half years from a Rababi and subsequently started his training with Master Ranbir Singh from whom he learned the dilruba for 4 years. In the following years, he also learned the jaltarang from Bhisham Gir Brahmachari and sitar from Pandit Ravi Shankar. Sant Sarwan Singh Ji established a school of music in Dumeli and the lessons were taught free of charge to students. Sant Ji also published many books among which are the 7 volumes of ‘Sur Simran Sangeet’. Sant Sarwan Singh Ji traveled to a few countries such as UK, USA and Canada to sow the seeds of Gurmat Sangeet. Thankfully, he was recorded during these tours and we are able to enjoy some of these recordings. If anyone has more recordings of his to share, please contact us.
